candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Noncurrent assets balancing line, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred over cash flow statement period-end cash.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Semantically related, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet line item target.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rates on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a stock balance item.

candidates.row_label: Adjustments to entries not included in cash flo - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, irrelevant.
Not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line. Duplicate instances exist across years, but the exact row label is the correct mapping.

candidates.why: Balancing line only, not the reported total current liabilities.
Noncurrent liabilities balancing line, not current liabilities.
Best reported total for current liabilities under IFRS-style labeling.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the explicit total current liabilities equivalent and clearly preferable to balancing items.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt; directly fits STD and excludes leases.
Can be short-term financing debt, but appears only in limited years and may be a component rather than the main total.
Clean total current interest-bearing debt line; preferred because it likely already includes current financing debt and avoids piecing components together.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Directly relevant current debt component excluding leases, but likely a component of short-term interest-bearing liabilities rather than a standalone complete total.

variables.notes: Preferred the clean total current financing debt line. Excluded 'Leases' per rule. Did not add maturities/overdraft to avoid potential double counting against the total interest-bearing current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Deferred tax, not current taxes payable.
Asset, not payable liability.

variables.notes: No shortlist was provided; selected the explicit current tax liability style label.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet aggregate for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.
Would be ideal, but preview values are blank; less clearly the active reported line than 'Tangible assets'.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related component, not total PPE.
Cash flow investing line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow line, not PPE balance.
Wrong asset class.

variables.notes: Under IFRS-style statements, 'Tangible assets' is the active aggregate corresponding to net PPE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net operating cash flow / cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities prior to changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the target.

variables.notes: Used the final net operating cash flow line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
